speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon
text: Bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon, aur koi raasta nahi hai. Aaj subah jab main sabke liye nashta bana rahi thi, Sasu-maa ne fir taana mara ki unki beti sasural mein kitni acchi tarah sab manage karti hai bina kisi shikayat ke. Meri poori identity is kitchen mein mit chuki hai aur main physically toot chuki hoon, par mujhe bina ruke bacchon ke tiffin pack karne hain. Agar main thak kar baith gayi toh poore joint family ka routine bigad jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty frame and the burden she carries to keep the household running.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki is poore ghar ki aur bacchon ki zimmedari sirf tumhare kandhon par hai, aur chahe kitni bhi physical thakan ho, tumhe apna yeh role bina ruke nibhana hi padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main ruki toh sab bolenge ki dekho bahu kaam se bach rahi hai. Sab muje hi buri niyat ka kahenge. Izzat ka sawal ban jata hai, isliye chup chap sab taane sunne padte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue softly by mirroring the feared consequence of being misjudged.
text: Yeh dar ki log tumhe galat samajh lenge aur tumhare kaam se bachne ka blame lagayenge, tumhe apni is thakan ko chupa lene par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Mere pair dard se ainth rahe hote hain subah se khade khade. Par joint family mein kisi ko kisi ki nahi padi hoti. Sabko bas apna nashta aur chai time par chahiye hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and the relentless nature of her physical pain amidst ignoring family.
text: Itne lammbe samay tak bina aaram kiye daily basis par sabki zarooratein poori karna, aur badle mein kisi ka support na milna, sach mein bahut dardnak hota hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Support toh door ki baat hai, bas comparison hota hai. Sasu-maa hamesha nanad ko better batati hain. Mere husband ko bolti hoon toh wo bas bolte hain ki ghar ke mamlon me mujhe kyu la rahi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she continues to function with no relational support.
text: Is akelepan ke beech, jab husband bhi alag hat jate hain aur lagatar taane jhelna padta hai, toh tum agle din wapas kitchen mein aane ki himmat kahan se jutati ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon
text: Bas bacchon ka chehra dekh leti hoon. Unke tiffin aur unke school ke liye hi main bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon. Unka dhyan kaun rakhega agar main ruk gayi toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational drive and duty towards her children.
text: Apne bacchon se judi yeh gahri parwah aur unki fikar hi tumhe har physical dard aur sasu-maa ke taano ke bawajood wapas kaam karne ki taqat de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, par andar se meri himmat toot chuki hai ab. Subah 5 baje se raat 11 baje tak machine ki tarah chalna. Rone tak ka time nahi milta mujhe, I just feel completely numb.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion from the duty-based coping mechanism.
text: Lagta hai is khatam na hone wale machine jaise routine ke peeche ek gahri EXHAUSTION aur thakan chupi hai, jahan tumhara apna wajood bas farz poora karne mein kahin kho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain aap. Meri khud ki koi pehchan bachi hi nahi hai ghar mein. Main sirf ek bahu aur ek maa bankar reh gayi hoon jiska duty bas dusron ko khush rakhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion as a result of cultural expectations on women in joint families.
text: Ek joint family setup mein jahan ghar ka saara kaam ek aurat par daal diya jata hai, tumhara is tarah apni pehchan khota hua mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Tum sach mein ek bohot bada farz akele nibha rahi ho, aur is total physical exhaustion ka matlab yeh nahi ki tumhari niyat mein koi kami hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par ghar mein koi nahi manta yeh. Agar main boloon ki thak gayi hoon, toh sasu-maa kehti hain unke zamane mein aurtein akele 15 logon ka khana banati thi bina kisi complain ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue by softly mirroring the judgment she faces.
text: Ghar ki doosri aurton se hamesha judge kiye jane aur purane zamane se compare hone ka darr, tumhe apne dard ko bilkul acknowledge karne se rok deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isiliye main ab bas chup rehti hoon aur kisi ko apna dard nahi batati. Par ab body jawab de rahi hai aage aise chalna namumkin lag raha hai. Batao kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to normalize her experience and validate before action.
text: Ek bahu aur maa hone mein is tarah apni body aur pehchan ko bhula dena hamare yahan bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein aurat ke 'tyaag' ko hi uska sabse bada farz mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, ye tyaag hi aakhiri me bas ek aadat ban jati hai. Par main theek hona chahti hoon. Mujhe bas apni body ko thodi saans lene deni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 quick, culturally acceptable suggestions that fit within her role.
text: Kya hum is lagatar duty ke beech koi chota sa aaram ka time nikal sakte hain? Jaise kitchen mein sabzi baith kar stool par katna jisse pairon par zor kam pade, ya phir bacchon ke aane se theek 10 minute pehle akele baith kar ek glass pani thehar kar peena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabzi baith kar katne wali baat theek lag rahi hai. Jaldi ke chakkar mein main aksar 3-4 ghante lagatar khadi hi reh jati hoon kitchen me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the chosen suggestion into a simple, immediate step.
text: Pehle kal subah jab tum pehli bar khana banane jao, toh gas ke paas ek stool nikal kar rakh lena... phir baith kar thodi sabzi kaatna... bas itna hi kal ki shuruaat ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon
text: Haan, stool wali baat asan hai aur kisi ko complaint karne ka mauka bhi nahi milega isme. Main bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon waise bhi, baith kar thoda support mil jayega body ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe regarding her stressor.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki 'achi bahu' aur is poore joint family ki care ka burden system ne hi auraton ke liye banaya hai, jisme tumhari aaram ki jagah nahi. Yeh exhaustion tumhari koi weak point nahi balki is duty-bound structure ka result hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash sasu-maa ko bhi yeh samajh aata. Unke time par jo unhone saha, woh bas chahti hain ki main bhi wahi sahun chup chaap.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she handles the generational pressure.
text: Sabke in purane tano aur ummeedon ke aage, tumhe apne liye aaram dhoondhne ke bajaye lagatar apna farz poora karne ko hi sacchai maan leni padi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jahan baat karne ka koi fayda na ho, wahan chup rehna hi samajhdari hai warna roz ke jhagde hote. Stool par baithna main apne aap hi manage kar lungi bina kuch bataye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she will manage her internal validation while implementing the step.
text: Jab tum kal pehli baar woh stool nikal kar kitchen mein akele baithogi, toh sasu-maa ke comparison ya purani baaton ka dar apne dil mein kam karne ke liye kya mind mein rakhogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud ko yehi yaad dilaungi ki mere bacchon ke school se aane par meri smile barkarar rahe, isiliye mujhe apne pairo ko ye 5 minute ka aaram dena zaruri hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she roots her self-care in her duty towards the kids.
text: Apne baccho ki khushi aur care ko aage rakh kar, tum khud ko yeh chota sa aaram dene ki perfect permission dhoondh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Warna agar main puri tarah bimar pad gayi toh unka homework, unka khana sab piche chhut jayega aur uski saza unhe bhugatni padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her long-term duration view of the consequences.
text: Ek lambe samay tak agar yeh daily daud-bhaag aisi hi chalti rahi toh sab kuch bikharne ka jo dar hai, wahi aaj tumhe aaram lene par push kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main is step ko jarur follow karungi kal se. Ab baat karke mujhe kafi better aur halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her feared consequence softly converting it into a positive step.
text: Darr lagta hai ki tumhari yeh poori body jawab na de de, par ab us darko peche chhodne ke liye tum ek thos kadam utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon
text: Shukriya mujhe sunne ke liye. Main bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon itne mahino se, kisi ne pucha hi nahi ki kya takleef hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength and right to space.
text: Is halat mein apni body ko protect karne ki yeh ek chhoti koshish bhi sach mein bohot zaruri aur tumhari andar ki himmat ki nishani hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Ab sham ho rahi hai toh bacchon ke khane ka intezam karna padega mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her returning to her duty.
text: Apne is bhari farz ke beech bhi, thoda sa apna dard bol kar saans lene ka tumhara yeh step bohot sahi raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Kal stool par baithkar kaam karungi. Bye abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End conversation acknowledging her ongoing evening tasks.
text: Din ke is aakhiri hisse mein bhi wahi kaam ka lamba silsila tumhe bulane lag gaya hai, apna kal se zaroor khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon
text: Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon. Sasu-maa ne aaj fir sabke samne kaha ki mera career chhodna unka ehsaan tha aur unki beti toh working hoke bhi ghar ka saara kaam akele karti hai. Sun kar andar se bilkul khali mehsus hua, par main rone ke liye bhi waqt nahi nikal sakti kyunki mujhe bacchon ki padhai aur dopahar ka khana dekhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame and the mechanical way she fulfills roles to keep peace.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki is ghar ki izzat aur shanti bachane ke chakkar mein, apne dukh ko bhula kar bas lagatar farz nibhana hi tumhari ekmatra zimmedari ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine palat ke jawab diya toh sab yahi bolenge ki career wali ladkiyan aisi hi badtameez hoti hain. Mujh par ungli uthegi, isliye chup chap sab sun leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the fear of being labeled a badtameez career woman.
text: Log tumhare purane career ko blame karenge aur tumhe galat samjhenge, yeh darr tumhe andar hi andar chup rehne par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Maine apni job chhodi unki khushi ke liye, apna independent hona sacrifice kiya. Aur ab sunne ko milta hai ki unka ehsaan tha. I feel so helpless. Par bacchon ke samne main weak nahi pad sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice of leaving her job and hiding her pain for the kids.
text: Apni family ke liye itna bada career sacrifice karne ke baad jab wahi taane milte hain, toh apne bacchon ki khaatir us takleef ko chupana aur bhi bhari padta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon
text: Bahut bhari lagta hai. Kabhi kabhi toh dopahar ka khana banate waqt aansu girte hain par main jaldi se poch leti hoon. Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she manages this constant suppression of her feelings during her daily routine.
text: Is tarah lagatar rote hue aansu chupana aur khud ko ek masheen ki tarah chalate rehna, tumhari bachi hui energy ko din bhar mein kaise affect karta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Energy toh jaise bachi hi nahi hai. Subah se raat tak bas ek timeline chalti hai. Nashta, tiffin, cleaning, lunch. It feels like mere wajood ki kisi ko parwah nahi, bas mera kaam dikhta hai unhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying exhaustion and feeling of being trapped in duty.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki is end-to-end duty cycle ke peeche ek gahri EXHAUSTION aur thakan chupi hai, jahan tumhara apna wajood bas ghar ke kaamon ke piche dab gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere wajood ki toh value hi nahi rahi jabse income aani band hui. Pehle sab thoda respect karte the. Ab lagta hai main unke upar bojh hoon. This thought makes me feel so small.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the stigma cue of feeling like a burden.
text: Bina financial contribution ke apni value kam hote hue dekhna, aur khud ko gharwalon par ek bojh samajhne ka ehsaas bahut takleef deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur mere husband bhi kuch nahi bolte. Unhe lagta hai mummy normal baat hi toh bol rahi hain. Main akele hi sab sah rahi hoon in sab expectations ke beech.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the cultural reality of giving up a career and lacking support.
text: Ek working woman jab sasural ke liye apna career chhodti hai, aur fir bhi uske sacrifice ko ehsaan bata diya jaye, toh aisi chot lagna bilkul laazmi hai. Tumne bahut bada compromise kiya hai, aur bina support ke is akelepan mein thakna tumhari koi kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon
text: Shukriya ki aapne mere us sacrifice ko samjha. Par roz roz yahi sunkar main thak gayi hoon. Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon, par kab tak chalega ye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about women leaving careers to normalize her situation.
text: Ghar ki khushi ke liye apna career chhodne ke baad is tarah ka dual pressure jhelna hamare society mein bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi aurat khul kar bolegi nahi kyunki izzat aur sanskar ki baatein beech mein aa jati hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Sab izzat ke naam pe humein bas chup kara dete hain. Par ab andar se itna khali mehsus hota hai ki kuch acha nahi lagta. Main is akelepan se thoda bahar aana chahti hoon, batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2-3 actionable, small suggestions fitting her duty-bound routine.
text: Kya hum is busy masheen wale routine mein ek choti si space nikal sakte hain? Jaise dopahar ke khane ke baad jab bacche padh rahe hon, toh 10 minute akele apni koi pasandida kitaab padhna, ya phir chai ka ek cup shanti se bina phone ya kaam ke balcony mein peena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chai wala option theek lag raha hai. Dopahar mein sasu-maa so jati hain, tab shayad main 10 minute nikal paun balcony mein shanti se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the chosen execution step simply.
text: Pehle kal dopahar jab sabka khana khatam ho jaye... phir ek cup chai banakar chupchap balcony mein jaakar baithna... bas itna hi kal apne liye karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh doable lag raha hai. Waise bhi kitchen mein ghis ghis kar hi poora din nikal jata hai, shayad thodi khuli hawa achi lage aur mind fresh ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a systemic reframe on the expectations of the household.
text: Yeh dhyan rakhna zaruri hai ki 'sanskaari bahu' ko lagatar kaam karte dekhne ki umeed is system ne hi banayi hai, aur tumhara khud ko masheen samajhna is strict structure ka asar hai, isme tumhara koi dosh nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: I agree. Structure hi aisa hai humari society ka. Agar main aaram karungi toh unhe main kaam-chor lagungi. Par ab main itna nahi soch sakti, mujhe apne liye waqt nikalna hi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from worrying about judgment to claiming her space.
text: Ab lagta hai tumne faisla kar liya hai ki logo ke us 'kaam-chor' wale taane se zyada, apna thoda sa aaram aur mental peace maintain karna tumhare farz ka hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon
text: Karna hi padega warna main sach me bimar pad jaungi. Aur agar main giri toh meri bacchon ka kya hoga? Bas unke liye apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon abhi tak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a grounding question about implementing the tea plan for her kids' sake.
text: Apne bacchon ka ye pyara khayal rakhte hue, kal balcony mein us 10 minute ki chai ke dauran tumhara poora focus apni kis choti si khushi par hoga?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main bas plants ko dekhungi. Mujhe gardening ka shauk tha job ke time. Ab toh uska waqt hi nahi milta. Bas hara bhara dekh kar mind thoda fresh ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of losing her hobby and regaining a piece of it.
text: Job chhutne ke baad se jo gardening ka waqt bilkul chala gaya tha, ab unhi paudhon ko thodi der akele dekhna tumhare liye purani shanti wapas la sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Purani yaadein taaza ho jayengi. Job ke days sach me best the, khud ki money, khud ka respect. Ab toh main bas dependent ban ke reh gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the stigma of feeling dependent and losing respect.
text: Wo purani azaadi aur respect khone ka afsos, aur ab financially dependent mehsoos karna sach mein ek bohot akela kar dene wala ehsaas hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot jyada. Par maine accept kar liya hai ki current reality yahi hai. Main apne bacchon ke future ke liye abhi koi drastic step nahi le sakti is ghar me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her relational acceptance and sacrifice for her children.
text: Baccho ke secure aane wale kal ki khaatir, tumne is takleef bhari reality ko bohot himmat ke sath aur bina koi shor machaye apna liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi himmat toh chahiye. Aaj thoda halka lag raha hai baat karke. Aisa lag raha hai koi toh hai jo samajhta hai ki main bas bina soche kaam nahi kar rahi, meri bhi feelings hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure her that her feelings matter and her sacrifice is significant.
text: Bilkul, tumhari feelings aur tumhari pehchan sirf is ghar ke kaamon tak seemit nahi hai. Tum ek jeeti-jaagti insaan ho jisne apni family ke liye bohot badi cheezein piche chhodi hain, aur is baat par tumhe khud par garv hona chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Main koshish karungi kal se khud ko sirf ek masheen na samjhun. Balki ek aisi aurat jo apne parivar ko sambhal rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a forward-looking question to help her consolidate this new self-view.
text: Jab tum kal balcony mein khud ko ek masheen ki jagah ek mazboot aurat ke roop mein dekhogi, toh us waqt apni din bhar ki thakan ko paudho ke samne kaise handle karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas aankhein band karke lambi saans lungi. Aur sochungi ki main bacchon ke liye jo kar rahi hoon, wo meri choice hai, aur main kaafi acha kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the positive reframing of her duty.
text: Apni thakan ko saanso se release karke, tum is baat par vishwas jama logi ki tumhara yeh maa wala farz apne aap mein puri tarah muqammal aur taqatwar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Ab mujhe bacchon ke lunch ki taiyari dekhni hai warna late ho jayega. Mujhe aapse baat karke bohot shanti mili aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End conversation safely acknowledging her return to her routine.
text: Is poore din ki bhaag-daud ke beech apna yeh thoda sa waqt mere sath nikalne ke liye shukriya, ab aaram se jaakar bacchon ka lunch dekho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek aadarsh bahu hone ka bojh mujhe lagatar structural endurance par majboor kar raha hai
text: Ek aadarsh bahu hone ka bojh mujhe lagatar structural endurance par majboor kar raha hai. Aaj rishtedaron ke samne Sasu-maa ne meri nanad ki tareef karte hue kaha ki usne jaldi pota de diya par main sirf ghar pe ek bojh hoon. Mera dimaag child pressure aur thakan se sunn ho chuka hai, par 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se main bina thake mehmano ki khatir-daari mein lagi hui hoon. Mere paas thakne ya rone ka option hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty frame and how she is suppressing her pain to serve others.
text: Tumhe mehsoos ho raha hai ki yeh aadarsh bahu banne ka farz nibhane ke liye, tumhe apna dukh aur thakan sab kuch daba kar sabki sewa karni pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main thodi bhi udas dikhi, toh sab bolenge ki dekho isko bacha nahi ho raha isliye muh latka ke ghoom rahi hai. Izzat bachane ke liye hasna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the feared consequence and judgment she faces to validate her stigma cue.
text: Yeh dar ki rishtedar tumhe tumhari situation ke liye judge karenge, tumhe jhoothi muskaan pehanne par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mera dimaag sunn pad gaya hai. Saara din bas kitchen aur guests ke beech nikal jata hai. Jab sasu-maa ne sabke samne 'ghar ka bojh' bola, toh andar se jaan nikal gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep relational pain of being insulted by family.
text: Jab jinke saath aap rehte ho wahi sabke samne aisi chubhne wali baat keh dein, toh akelapan bohot gahra lagne lagta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akelapan toh hai. Husband bhi wahan baithe the, par unhone kuch nahi bola. Unhe lagta hai mummy mazak kar rahi thi. Par ek aurat ke liye pota na de pana kitna bada taana hota hai, ye koi nahi samajhta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she pushes through this isolation to continue fulfilling her household duties.
text: Is akelepan aur itne bhari tano ke beech, jab husband ka bhi koi support nahi milta, toh tum lagatar mehmano ka kaam akele kaise sambhal pa rahi ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek aadarsh bahu hone ka bojh mujhe lagatar structural endurance par majboor kar raha hai
text: Bas machine ban gayi hoon. Ek aadarsh bahu hone ka bojh mujhe lagatar structural endurance par majboor kar raha hai. Rone ka time hi nahi hai kyunki sab chai-nashta mangte rehte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relentless time duration of her mechanical routine.
text: Subah se raat tak is tarah bina ruke lagatar kaam karte rehna, aur uske beech rone tak ka waqt na milna, bohot thaka dene wala hota hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot zyada. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai meri apni koi aukaat hi nahi hai is ghar mein. Sirf ek naukrani ya bacha paida karne wali machine samajhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the fear of disappointing family mixed with the trapped worthlessness feeling.
text: Lagta hai is saare kaam aur sabko khush rakhne ke farz ke peeche ek constant FEAR OF DISAPPOINTING THE FAMILY hai, jisne tumhe poori tarah jhakad liya hai aur tumhe lagne laga hai ki tumhari khud ki koi aukaat nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi baat hai. Meri degree, mera nature, kisi cheez ki koi value nahi. Bas pota nahi hai toh main bojh hoon. Ye sab soch ke bilkul worthlessness feel hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her worth and normalise the distress caused by the cultural obsession with male heirs.
text: Humari society mein jahan aurat ka wajood sirf bacha paida karne se jod diya jata hai, tumhara is taane ke baad worthlessness mehsoos karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Tum lagatar sabka khayal rakh rahi ho, yeh tumhari taqat hai, aur sasu-maa ke tano se tumhari sachhi keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Par roz roz yahi sunna padta hai. Abhi bhi mehman drawing room me hain, aur main kitchen me ro rahi hoon chup ke se. Dar hai ki aake koi dekh na le.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma and fear of being caught crying.
text: Koi rishtedar aakar tumhare aansu dekh lega aur phir naye taane shuru ho jayenge, yeh darr tumhe khul ke rone bhi nahi de raha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, log kya kahenge yahi dar sabse bada hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki is sab ko kaise sehen karoon. Batao kya karoon main, aage ka rasta bilkul andhera lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 actionable, quick coping suggestions fitting her current environment.
text: Kya hum is thakan ke beech apne aaram ke liye ek choti si jagah nikal sakte hain? Jaise mehmano ko chai dene ke baad agle 10 minute tak kitchen mein door band karke akele stool par baith jana, ya phir sabke sone ke baad bathroom mein kuch der thande paani se muh dho kar shanti se baithna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kitchen me door band karna thoda risk hai, but washroom mein 5-10 minute akele baithne wala option acha hai. Wahan koi disturb nahi karega aur aansu bhi dhul jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step by step through the washroom plan.
text: Pehle aaj jab mehman chale jayein aur sab so jayein… phir seedha washroom jana aur sirf apna face dho kar 5 minute wahan theharna… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek aadarsh bahu hone ka bojh mujhe lagatar structural endurance par majboor kar raha hai
text: Haan, yeh main kar sakti hoon. Ek aadarsh bahu hone ka bojh mujhe lagatar structural endurance par majboor kar raha hai, but atleast wahan main sirf apne saath rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on the pressure to produce a child and serve flawlessly.
text: Yeh dhyan rakhna zaruri hai ki 'pota' dene aur perfect khatir-daari karne ka pressure tumhare upar is samaj ke structure ne daala hai; yeh tumhari asafalta nahi hai, balki system ka bojh hai jo akele tum utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat samajhna dil ko thodi shanti deta hai. Mere ander toh jaise guilt baith gaya tha ki main hi defective hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue of feeling defective.
text: Khud ko defective manna aur us guilt ko apne upar le lena, kitna bhari lagta hoga andar se...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot bhari. But ab lag raha hai ki sab meri galti nahi hai. Main apna best try kar rahi hoon, ghar sambhal rahi hoon. Agar sasu-maa ko nahi dikhta toh main kya kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her acceptance of fulfilling her duty despite the lack of validation.
text: Tumne accept kar liya hai ki tum apna farz poori wafadaari se nibha rahi ho, aur doosron ki umeedon ko na badal pana tumhare haath mein nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar main lagatar khud ko kosti rahungi toh mere andar ki bachi kuchi jaan bhi khatam ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help her ground herself with a positive reflection during her planned coping moment.
text: Is guilt se thoda bahar nikal kar, jab aaj raat washroom mein tum akele paani se face dhogi, toh us moment mein apni kis baat par garv mehsoos karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud ko kahungi ki main itni buraai sunkar bhi tooti nahi, maine sabka khayal rakha aur meri himmat sach me badi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure her strength and ability to withstand the pressure.
text: Itni chot khane ke baad bhi apni himmat ko pehchan na, sach mein tumhari bohot badi taqat hai. Tumhara yeh attitude tumhe is taano bhare mahaul mein mazboot banaye rakhega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Kisi ne mujhe is nazar se nahi dekha. Sabko bas meri kamiyan dikhti hain. Aaj lag raha hai ki I am not totally worthless.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from feeling worthless to seeing her own value.
text: Sabki negative baaton ke beech, aakhir kaar tumhe apne andar ki woh keemat aur achhai dikhne lagi hai jo log ignore kar rahe the.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main aage se unki baaton ko dil pe nahi lungi. Wo unki soch hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a final normalizing reframe on the family's narrow thinking.
text: Baaki logon ke taane aur unki narrow soch unki apni limitations dikhate hain, yeh tumhare kirdaar ya tumhari value ka certificate nahi ho sakte.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. Main khamakha khud ko guilty feel kara rahi thi. Mujhe apne aaram ka bhi haq hai, thoda sa hi sahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help her transition back to her duty with a stronger, insulated mindset.
text: Apne is naye haq aur chote se aaram ke sath, abhi jo mehman drawing room mein hain, unhe face karte waqt tumhari feeling kahan tak alag hogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab main thoda detached ho ke unka kaam karungi. Meri duty hai toh nibha dungi, par andar se unki baat ko reject kar dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her healthy emotional detachment while still fulfilling her role.
text: Ab farz pura toh hoga, lekin apne dil ko unki chot pahunchane wali baaton se alag aur surakshit rakh kar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Shukriya aapka. Main ab bahar jaati hoon. Unhe kuch aur chahiye hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End conversation warmly, affirming her coping plan for the night.
text: Is lambe chalne wale routine ke beech aaj ka tumhara yeh step tumhe ek sukoon bhari raat ki taraf le jaye, apna khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe apne aansu pi kar raat ka khana tayar karne mein lagna hi padega
text: Aaj pooja ke waqt sasu-maa ne sabke saamne keh diya ki unki beti ke sanskar mujhse lakh guna behtar hain. Main is joint family ki badi zimmedariyon tale itni dab chuki hoon ki mujhe yaad hi nahi main aakhri baar kab theek se soyi thi, par is ghar ka pahiya mere hi endurance ke bharose chalta hai. Isliye is takleef ke bawajood, mujhe apne aansu pi kar raat ka khana tayar karne mein lagna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her commitment to her role despite the pain using Lens B.
text: Tumhari baaton se saaf jhalak raha hai ki chahe andar kitna bhi dukh aur thakan ho, tumhara poora focus is par hai ki is bade pariwar ki rozaana ki zarooratein aur raat ka khana bina kisi rukaawat ke chalte rahein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main ruk gayi toh pura ghar bikhar jayega. Subah uthne se lekar raat ke bartan dhone tak, main bas ek bhaar dhoti rehti hoon. Meri mehnat ko koi value nahi milti yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the continuous timeframe of her unspoken labor using Lens D.
text: Subah ki pehli kiran se lekar raat ko sone tak, bina koi break liye, tum lagatar is ghar ki zarooraton ko poora karne mein lagi rehti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, par kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad mere andar hi koi kami hai. Shayad main itne bade ghar ke layak hi nahi hoon jahan koi mere maike aur sanskar ko hamesha nicha dikhata rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue softly by reflecting the relational strain using Lens C without adding pressure.
text: Aise lagatar tano ke beech reh kar, apni kabiliyat par shaq hona aur khud ko akela paana bohot takleefdeh ho sakta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Takleef hoti hai, bohot zyada. Sar mein hamesha ek bhari pan rehta hai aajkal. Sasu-maa ko lagta hai mere ghar walo ne mujhe kuch sikhaya hi nahi, unki nazar mein main bas apne farz poore karti hoon, bas aur kuch nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the underlying fear that her efforts are constantly weaponized against her family using Lens E.
text: Is baat ka darr hamesha satata rehta hai ki tumhari har koshish ko nakar kar, usko tumhare maike ki izzat par sawal uthane ke liye istemal kiya jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, wahi sabse bada darr hai. Main chahti hoon ki sab khush rahein, par meri toh khushi aur hasi hi gayab ho gayi hai pichle kuch saalon mein. Apni lost identity ka khayal aate hi dil baith jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to probe deeper into how she feels about losing her own peace while fulfilling duties.
text: Abhi tumne jo kaha usse samajh aa raha hai ki tum sabko khush rakhna chahti ho, par us lost identity ke ehsaas ke beech, tumhara apna sukoon kahan kho gaya hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe apne aansu pi kar raat ka khana tayar karne mein lagna hi padega
text: Mera apna koi sukoon bacha hi nahi hai. Bas ek kaam karne wali machine ban gayi hoon. Chahe din bhar kitna bhi dard ho, baatein kitni bhi chubh rahi hon, phir bhi mujhe apne aansu pi kar raat ka khana tayar karne mein lagna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core feeling of being trapped and helpless amidst the unending joint family duties.
text: Lagta hai joint family ki in khatam na hone wali expectations ke bojh tale tum khud ko behad trapped aur helpless mehsus kar rahi ho, jahan tumhare lagatar kaam karne ke bawajood tumhe thodi si izzat nahi mil rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat hai. Mere lagatar kaam ki koi value nahi hai. Main akeli kitchen mein kaam karti rehti hoon aur bahar sab haste rehte hain. Kabhi kabhi toh numbness si lagti hai, jaise main ab aur mehsoos hi nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the feeling of numbness within the cultural context of a joint family's unacknowledged labor.
text: Hamare samaj mein aksar joint families mein bahuon se umeed ki jati hai ki woh sab kuch seh kar sirf farz nibhayen, isliye us pressure mein aisi numbness aur ghutan aana bilkul swabhavik hai. Par tumhara bina thake kaam karna, tumhari kadr ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa sunna bohot sukoon deta hai. Yahan toh sab mujhe hi dosh dete hain. Aur pooja wale incident ke baad toh mera andar se puri tarah tut jane ka man ho raha tha, jaise meri koi pehchan hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic observation about comparison during religious events in families.
text: Bade pariwar mein aisi situation aana bohot common hai, jahan kisi bhi religious gathering ya pooja mein bahu ke kaam aur maike ko compare kiya jata hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi izzat ke darr se ispar khul kar bolta nahi kyunki sabko ideal pariwar dikhna hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Izzat ke darr se hi hum chup rehte hain. Par mere sar ka bhari pan aur yeh exhaustion ab bardasht nahi hota. Mujhe abhi kuch samajh nahi aa raha, main in sabke beech kya karoon aage ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, culturally congruent options to help her find moments of peace within her heavy duty schedule.
text: Agar hum choti si shuruat karein, toh kya tum khana banate waqt sirf 5 minute ke liye rasoi se thoda door khidki ke paas aa sakti ho, ya phir raat ko sone se pehle 5 minute apne maike mein kisi apne se halki phulki baat kar sakti ho bina kisi takleef ka zikra kiye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko khana banate waqt rasoi se hatna mushkil hoga. Sasu maa ko lagega main kaam se bhaag rahi hoon. Par haan, sone se pehle apni behen se 5 minute baat karna possible hai, woh raat ko aaram se ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her step-by-step through the process of taking 5 minutes to call her sister.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aaj jab tumhara saara kaam nipat jaye aur tum akele bistar par aao, toh apna phone lo aur kisi stress ke bare mein soche bina, bas apni behen ko ek chota sa call milao. Aaj ke liye bas itna hi karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh theek rahega. Sirf normal baatein karungi, apne bachpan ki aur purane dino ki. Isse kam se kam mujhe meri lost identity ka thoda sa hissa wapas mehsus hoga aur main bhool paungi thodi der ke liye yeh sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the comparison and taunts as structural control rather than personal shortcomings.
text: Yeh samajhna bohot zaroori hai ki 'sanskar' aur dusron se tumhara yeh comparison, darasal joint family ke is system ka ek hissa ban chuka hai jisse control rakha ja sake, iska tumhari asali khubiyon ya izzat se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton se kafi tasalli mil rahi hai. Main itne dinon se sab kuch dil par le rahi thi. Unki taane bas ek control karne ka tareeqa hai. Par pata hai, us waqt sach mein bohot gussa aata hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling the anger she explicitly named by reflecting the relational strain using Lens C.
text: Achanak se sabke saamne necha dikhaye jaane par, us gusse ka aana bohot natural hai, jo is rishte mein tumhari poori lagan aur sehan shakti ko adhoora bata deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe apne aansu pi kar raat ka khana tayar karne mein lagna hi padega
text: Haan, gussa toh aata hai, par main kuch bolti nahi. Cycle wahi hoti hai, mujhe apne aansu pi kar raat ka khana tayar karne mein lagna hi padega. Par ab lagta hai main unke tano ko thoda alag rakh kar kaam kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her shifting approach to duty, moving away from internalizing the taunts using Lens B.
text: Tumhara focus ab is baat par shift ho raha hai ki unki tano bhari baaton ko dil se lagaye bina, tum apna kaam aur farz ek shant tareeqe se poora karti raho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Kyunki agar mera dimag shant nahi rahega toh main physically bilkul exhaust ho jaungi, jo main nahi hone dena chahti. Mujhe is ghar mein survive karna hai toh khud ko thoda detach rakhna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking to explore how this nighttime routine will help her daytime endurance.
text: Jab tum apni behen se baat karke us detachment ko mehsus karogi, toh us aakhri shanti se agle din subah uthne par tumhari thakan aur kam ke prati nazariye mein kya farq aayega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad kal subah uthne par sar mein itna bhari pan nahi hoga. Main khud ko thoda halka mehsus karungi aur sasu maa ki kisi bhi comment ko aasaani se ignore kar paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her smart, subtle strategy of finding peace without disrupting family roles.
text: Tumhara apne andar ki shanti ko bachane ke liye yeh chota sa kadam uthana dikhata hai ki itne dabaav mein bhi tum kitni samajhdari se apne liye ek sakaratmak jagah bana rahi ho, bina ghar ki jimmedari ko nuksan pahunchaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhanyawad. Mujhe lagta tha ki ghar walo ke aage main apne liye waqt nahi nikal sakti, par yeh raat ka ek chota sa call ka badlaav bohot asaan hai aur kisi ko pata bhi nahi chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her chronological shift toward ending the day on a positive note using Lens D.
text: Raat ke un aakhri 5 minute ko apne liye bacha lene se, tum chahti ho ki poore din ki thakan aur negitive baatein ek aache pal mein theher jayein, aur agla din naya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere din ki shuruaat chahe kitchen ki bhid mein ho, par raat ko jab main sone jaungi, toh mere paas apni behen se judi achhi yaadein hongi sochne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her need to distance herself from the constant judgment of the household using Lens C.
text: Is ghar ke jis mahol mein sab tumhe lagatar ek kasauti par toulte hain, tum is chote se naye waqt mein khud ko un taano ke bojh se door rakh kar azaad mehsus karna chahti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahi sabse zaroori hai mere liye ab. Mujhe is poore stress aur tulna mein se apni asliyt ko bachana hai, chahe sasu maa poora din kaisa bhi mahol banayein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking how this newfound peace will help her handle future occurrences of the taunts.
text: Agar is raat ki shanti se tumhe kal subah aane wale kisi naye tano ka samna karne ki nayi himmat milti hai, toh tum apne andar kis tarah ka thehrao mehsus karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud ko utna helpless aur tuta hua mehsus nahi karungi. Mujhe yaad rahega ki mere maike ki sikh achhi hai aur main mehnat karti hoon. Inke gusse par ab mujhe apna aapa nahi khona.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a final reframing that confirms her good upbringing is entirely separate from their judgments.
text: Yeh dhyaan rakhna kafi rahat deta hai ki sasu maa ki lagatar tulna darasal unka ek purana ravaiya hai, aur us tanaav ka tumhare maike ya tumhare apne sangeen aur sachche sanskaron se kabhi koi haqiqi lena dena tha hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, yeh chiz ab samajh aane lagi hai mujhe. Mere apne sanskar meri taqat hain. Aaj aapse baat karke sar ka wo bhari pan sach mein kaafi kam ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising her resilience and capability to preserve her identity while managing her complex family situation.
text: Tumne jis mazbooti aur thehraav ke sath apni lost identity aur izzat ko wapas paane ka rasta dhoonda hai, woh wakayi tarif ke kabil hai. Ghar aur parivar ki aisi dekhbhal karte hue bhi apni khushi ko sambhalna sach mein tumhari sabse badi taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega
text: Mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega. Shaam ki chai dete waqt Sasu-maa ne phir se comparison kiya ki kundali milane ke baad bhi main unki beti jaisi sarvgun-sampann bahu nahi ban payi. Din bhar ka kaam karke meri kamar toot rahi hai aur career gap ka regret kha raha hai, par mere halat 'cannot afford to stop' wale hain. Isliye main apni saari takleef daba kar kal ki taiyari mein jut gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role-based duty frame and the burden of keeping the household running.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki chahe kitna bhi dard aur regret kyu na ho, ghar ka routine barkarar rakhne ke liye tumhe aaram karne ka haq hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Agar main thoda bhi ruki, toh seedha yahi sunne milega ki iske toh nakhre khatam nahi hote, padhi-likhi bahu aisi hi hoti hai. Meri padhai aur background dono pe ungli uth jaati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the feared consequence of her education being blamed to address the stigma cue.
text: Yeh darr ki aaram karne par seedha tumhari padhai aur parvarish par taane aayenge, tumhe bina ruke kaam karte rehne par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main chup rehti hoon ki kam se kam kalesh na ho. Mere husband ka business me time jata hai, unka dhyan nahi hai in choti baaton pe. Isliye saara physical stress akele uthati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational isolation and lack of support from her husband.
text: Jab husband apni duniya mein itne vyast hon aur tumhara yeh struggle na dekh payein, toh kalesh bachane ke liye yeh saara bojh akele dhona aur bhi bhari ho jata hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega
text: Bhari toh bohot hai. Subah 6 baje se raat ke 11 baj jaate hain, masheen ki tarah ghoomti rehti hoon ghar me. Mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega aur uski saza mujhe hi milegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the duration and how she sustains this constant exertion.
text: Subah se raat tak lagatar aise masheen ki tarah chalne ke bawajood, jab physical takleef bohot badh jaati hai, toh tum kal ki taiyari shuru karne ki himmat kahan se jutati ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh nahi hoti, bas ek dar rehta hai. Kundali mein mere liye sarvgun-sampann likha tha, agar main thak ke gir gayi toh mere maike walo par baat aayegi ki inki beti ne toh thodi takleef bhi bardaasht nahi ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying fear and exhaustion from carrying her family's reputation.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki is lagatar thakan ke peeche ek constant FEAR OF DISAPPOINTING everyone hai, jahan apne maike ki izzat bachane ke dabaav ne tumhe puri tarah se EXHAUST kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Unhone bohot umeed se meri shadi ki thi. Maine IT ki achi job chhod di ki naye ghar mein adjust ho jaaun. Aur ab na job rahi, na izzat milti hai. Bas ye 'cannot afford to stop' wala loop hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her sacrifice and normalise the distress caused by the double burden of giving up a career and gaining only exhaustion.
text: Apni family ke liye itna bada IT career sacrifice karna koi choti baat nahi hai. Jab itne bade tyag ke baad bhi sirf comparison aur taane milein, toh aisi gahri thakan aur regret hona bilkul natural hai. Tumhare is exhaustion ka matlab yeh nahi ki tum mein koi kami hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you ki aap meri baat samajh rahe hain. Ghar me agar mai yahi baat bolu toh bolte hain ki ghar sambhalne me kaunsa pahad toot raha hai, sab aurtein karti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the invalidation she faces to address the stigma cue.
text: Gharwalon se jab apni itni bhari mehnat aur sacrifice ko 'sab aurtein karti hain' keh kar dismiss hote hue sunna padta hai, toh khud ko explain karna bhi bekaar lagne lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega
text: Haan, isliye main ab bolti hi nahi hoon. Par sach mein, kamar itni dukh rahi hai aaj ki kal ki taiyari karna mushkil ho raha hai. Mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about career gaps and household pressure to normalize her experience.
text: Ek padhi-likhi aurat ka shadi ke liye apna career chhod kar is 'perfect bahu' wale role mein lag jana, aur fir itni takleef mein bhi support na milna — yeh pattern bohot common hai humari society mein. Sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki sabko 'adjust' karna sikhaya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, adjust karte karte insaan khud ko hi bhool jata hai. Main bhi bhool rahi hoon khud ko. Ab aage aise chal nahi paungi. Batao kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps that fit her strict routine without dropping her duties.
text: Kya hum kal ke schedule ko thoda sa aasan bana sakte hain? Jaise, kitchen mein sabzi baith kar kaatna taaki kamar par aur zor na pade, ya phir kal dopahar ke khane ke baad, ghar walon ke saamne jaane se pehle, 10 minute akele kamre mein bina kuch kiye seedha let jana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabzi baith kar katne wala option main try kar sakti hoon. Usme time waste nahi hoga, par shayad body ko thoda support mil jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through implementing the chosen step simply.
text: Pehle kal subah jab tum khana banane jao, toh ek stool gas ke paas rakh lena... phir baith kar aaram se sabzi kaatna... bas itna hi naya kal ki shuruaat ke liye karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega
text: Okay, stool waali baat asan lag rahi hai. Mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega, but baith kar kaam chalega toh shayad kamar dard thoda kam ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframe her exhaustion, validating that it's a structural issue, not her failure.
text: Yeh dhyaan rakhna zaruri hai ki 'sarvgun-sampann bahu' ka bojh aur is ghar ka lamba schedule poori tarah se society ke purane rules par bana hai; tumhari thakan tumhari asafalta nahi, is unfair system ka result hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baatein sunkar himmat milti hai. Warna main khud ko hi kosti rehti thi ki shayad mujhme hi patience kam hai ya main adjust nahi kar pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from self-blame to self-compassion.
text: Apne hi darr aur khud ko kosne wale us bojh se, ab tumhe thodi rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai jab pata chala ki galti tumhare andar nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, kaafi rahat hai. Main kal sestool zaroor nikal lungi kitchen me. Shayad isse mera poora schedule bhi chalta rahe aur thoda aaram bhi ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a grounding question about how she will use this moment of seated work.
text: Kal jab tum us stool par baithkar sabzi kaatogi, toh us akele waqt mein apne din ki shuruaat ko aur shaant banane ke liye apne baare mein kya sochogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yahi sochungi ki main apna best kar rahi hoon, ghar ki responsibilities nibha rahi hoon. Koi appreciate kare ya na kare, maine apna farz poora kiya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her internal validation over external appreciation.
text: Bahar se taareef mile ya nahi, par tum apne farz ko nishtha se poora karke apne andar khud ke liye respect aur himmat zaroor bana logi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isse sasu-maa ki baaton ka asar bhi mujh par kam hoga. Unka kaam hai comparisons karna, mera kaam hai apni health aur ghar dono sambhalna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her emotional boundary against the comparisons.
text: Unke taano aur tumhare farz ke beech tumne yeh bohot clearly samajh liya hai ki tumhara pehla dhyaan apni body aur apne kaam ko balance karne par hona chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Warna career toh wapas abhi aane se raha. Wo ek dukh hamesha rahega. Par usey soch kar main apna aaj nahi kharab kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly acknowledge the lingering grief of the lost career.
text: Us purane chhute hue career ka lamba dukh hamesha saath chalega, par tum us dukh ko apne aaj ke din ko kharab nahi karne dena chahti...

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, ab bilkul nahi. Main kal se chote chote steps lungi apni body ko aaram dene ke liye, beshak dusron ko pata bhi na chale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure her strength in making quiet, effective changes for herself.
text: Bina kisi kalesh ke apne aaram ka dhyan rakhne ki yeh khamosh aur samajhdaar planning, sach mein is mushkil mahaul mein tumhari sabse badi taqat banegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega
text: Ji. Mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega, isliye main chalte chalte hi aaram nikalungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help her visualize a long-term benefit from this small step.
text: Jab yeh chote chote chalte-chalte liye gaye aaram ke moments tumhari thakan ko kam karne lagenge, toh tumhare din ki shuruaat mein kya fark aayega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main subah itne dard aur chid-chidapan ke saath nahi uthungi. Ghar ka mahaul bhi shant rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the positive outcome of less pain and more peace.
text: Dard ka darr aur subah ki chid-chidapan ko kam karne ka yeh naya tareeqa shayad sach mein tumhare din aur ghar ko shant bana dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yahi ummeed karti hoon. Abhi mujhe bartan dekhne hain kal ke liye, aapka dhanyawad itna samajhne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End safely acknowledging her return to the routine with the new plan in mind.
text: Der raat ke is lammbe kaam ke beech apna dhyaan rakhne ka faisla tumne theek kar liya hai, apna kal se zaroor khayal rakhna.
